blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 1 — Long-Form Pre-Production
blocks.desc: Peak hour, biggest lift. Props, locations, scene/shot list, script, edit + film direction. Push hard until you head out.

blocks.title: 🚆 Out — Penn Station (sign lease, 11:00 AM)
blocks.desc: Head down, sign the lease, back by 11:15. Laundromat here if there's time.

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 2 — Shorts Batch Brief (Batch 4)
blocks.desc: Back at the desk. Build the Batch 4 brief — what to film + how it'll be edited.

blocks.title: 📌 Daily Post
blocks.desc: LinkedIn must be live by end of this block.

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 2 (cont.) — finish Batch 4 Brief
blocks.desc: Production before any handoff. If it's not done, carry it.

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 3 — Continuation
blocks.desc: Mop up everything unfinished from DW1 + DW2: today's short edit, Batch 4 spillover, then long-form. Take a short break as needed. Laundromat if not done earlier.

blocks.title: 🔒 Flexible Deep Work — Long-Form
blocks.desc: Won't finish long-form today, but push it forward.
